dev.jeka.core.api.java

Class JkJavaVersion

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.java.JkJavaVersion
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Comparable<JkJavaVersion>

    public final class JkJavaVersion
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.lang.Comparable<JkJavaVersion>
    Java specification version

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static JkJavaVersion LAST_LTS
      Last LTS version at the time of releasing this JeKa version.

      Stands for Java Version 11
